svg.title: Reference-inspired crypto ATS market-data architecture
svg.desc: A six-stage accepted deep-book pipeline with independent session health, generation-safe recovery, cache-first fan-out, and replay parity.
svg.text: One canonical pipeline, informed by established open-source connector and data-engine patterns.

g.text: Connector owns venue lifecycle and subscriptions
Separate order-book data source, tracker, and state
Adapters normalize venue APIs into domain events
Data engine updates cache before publishing to bus
Common contracts keep exchange details behind adapters

svg.text: recorded input returns through the same connector contract
Design rule: downstream code consumes accepted canonical state and is independent of REST, WebSocket, FIX, third-party, or replay transport.
